programme.title: SBJ: Inside the Industry
programme.desc: The Olympic flame is burning bright! Host Tarik and Abe are joined in studio by SBJ's Olympic reporter Rachel Axon and gold medalist Thea LaFond, who discuss their Olympic experiences and dig into the development, logistics, and evolution of the world's greatest athletic events. Featured interviews with Sarah Hirshland, the CEO of the US Olympic and Paralympic Committee, and Catherine Gosselin-Després, the Chief Sport Officer of the Canadian Paralympic Committee.

programme.title: Politics Aside with Chris Cillizza
programme.desc: Chris runs drills at Ravens Stadium with Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott and later, shoots hoops with Virgina Rep. Suhas Subramanyam at Wizards legend Gheorghe Muresan's Giant Basketball Academy in Ashburn. Along the way, Chris explores how youth sports and community shape political leadership.

programme.title: Politics Aside with Chris Cillizza
programme.desc: In this episode of Politics Aside with Chris Cillizza: America's Gladiators, Chris talks military service and fitness with two American warriors serving in Congress. Former Naval Intelligence Officer, Jimmy Panetta (D-CA), and former US Marine and USN Emergency room physician Rich McCormick (R-GA). Along the way, Chris skates through the halls of Congress, takes a stab at the Marine Sword Salute, and has his fitness tested by a real American Gladiator.

programme.title: Fresh Sheet
programme.desc: History hangs in the balance as Ovechkin closes in on the 900th goal of his career. Meanwhile, the Caps' Tom Wilson and Logan Thompson push through a pivotal stretch, chasing Olympic dreams with Team Canada in sight. Milestones and legacy collide.

programme.title: Caps Red Line
programme.desc: The Capitals trade their pucks for golf balls at the annual Caps Fore Charity event, Alexa Landestoy catches up with Martin Fehérváry to discuss dad duty and his time at the Olympics, while former Olympian Lyndsey Fry hits the ice to lead an inspiring women's & girl's clinic. Plus, go behind the scenes for an inside look at Capital One Arena's dramatic transformation!

programme.title: Beyond the Buzzer
programme.desc: The Wizards are making time for connection and fun by teeing it up for charity at Ballers and Birdies, welcoming a special fan to practice, and sharing a courtside moment with Capitals legend, Alex Ovechkin. Plus, Wes Hall gets the inside scoop on Bub Carrington's pre-game ritual!

programme.title: Building Up
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes of the trade deadline acquisitions of Trae young and Anthony Davis. Following the two stars as they navigate their new city and team. Culminating in the much-anticipated debut of Trae young's first game as a member of the Washington Wizards.

programme.title: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: Kiki Iriafen is mic'd up at practice, Coach Johnson reveals his coaching style, and Georgia Amoore discusses her injury journey. Shakira Austin battles with Chicago star Angel Reese, and the Mystics go down to the wire against Las Vegas.

programme.title: Fresh Paint
programme.desc: We follow rookies Kiki Iriafen and Sonia Citron as they take part in All-Star Weekend festivities, including Sonia's preparation for the three-point contest, and we spend a day with Georgia Amoore as she continues her rehab.
